message:
feat(drift): warn on multi-repo workspace baseline operations

When --save-baseline, --check-drift, or --robot-drift is used with a
multi-repo workspace, emit a warning that baselines are not fully
supported for multi-repo setups and suggest per-repo baselines via
--beads-file as a workaround.

Previously, multi-repo baseline operations silently produced results
with un-namespaced IDs, which could cause false drift alerts or missed
real drift due to ID collisions between repos.

Full multi-repo baseline support (per-repo sections, repo add/remove
detection) is deferred as a future feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
